---
title: "Faculty and APP Phone Numbers"
---

Faculty
Ameli 407-489-7679 Orlova 732-979-1757
Armstrong 443-613-2469 Patel 317-869-5656
Bonnell 801-815-5000 Patterson 937-467-9119
Bruzzone 708-790-5822 Peng 617-599-5602
Buchowicz 475-227-9832 Pizzi 850-559-4402
Burks 352-562-2450 Ramirez-Zamora 312-972-3475
Burns 847-644-3561 Rawls 352-422-6361
Busl 617-820-9858 Rempe 929-284-8052
Carneiro 857-930-9914 Roach 352-222-7730
Cibula 352-642-2645 Robinson 304-646-4613
Da Silva 312-722-7582 Roth 847-322-2557
Eisenschenk 352-262-9114 Ruffing 941-809-0658
Fanty 281-460-5679 Shuhaiber 312-286-1059
FitzGerald 352-283-2000 Shukla 501-213-6201
Ford 239-877-6252 Singh 301-538-5096
Hess 718-986-3297 Solomon 910-315-9595
Jaffee 210-316-6753 Subramony 601-750-1605
Kalamangalam 713-805-7148 Tholanikunnel 843-834-0751
Khanna 732-742-5666 Triggs 352-262-8690
Maciel 917-355-2504 Wang 203-843-8250
Malaty 352-682-3718 Weisbrod 585-301-5236
McFarland, N 352-327-1359 Wilson 215-820-5120
Montalvo 401-316-0906 Wong 424-237-5446
Nadeau 352-514-5611 Wymer 518-928-2065
Okun 352-262-6314 Yehya 614-804-8054
Inpatient APPs
Holder (Stroke) 352-494-6924 Ng (Stroke) 813-334-4190
Kenworthy (Stroke) 352-682-9365 Purtlebaugh (Stroke) 352-339-1741
